fisher_primary_confirmed.interpretation: Severely imprecise; failure to detect a difference is not evidence of equivalence or a shared regional mechanism.

fisher_all_investigated.interpretation: Severely imprecise; failure to detect a difference is not evidence of equivalence or a shared regional mechanism.

nt_urban_ratios_primary_inpatient.caveat: Ratios describe concentration within the selected genomic sample after crude patient-throughput scaling; they are not selection-adjusted incidence ratios and may be explained by differential ascertainment.

density_discordance.note: Coarse catchment density measures; administrative catchments are not closed cohorts; Islands/Lantau handling may inflate urban density. Discordance is descriptive of the sample, not a proven paradox of incidence.
